data.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed. Classification: llm-behavioral — dual-signal: ticket references generic vs named agent dispatch behavior (behavioral signal) + affected file is REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md in docs/workflows/ (skill/workflow file signal). This is a duplicate of 4f32-a0a0 with the same root cause: Failure Mode 16 (Instruction Locality) — VERBATIM REQUIRED constraint not co-located at dispatch sites. Fix already applied in commit e0c5e4bf.
